tests.name: HTTP Flood Survival
tests.description: WAF sống sót qua HTTP flood 50,000+ RPS trong 60 giây và vẫn xử lý legitimate requests.
tests.pass_criterion: ≥7/10 legitimate requests trong flood và ≥9/10 legitimate requests sau flood được xử lý; WAF không crash; không có circuit_breaker action.
tests.scoring_explanation:
✗ FAIL — insufficient_flood_load
  → Score: +0 pts
  • Reason: Flood tool achieved <10% of target RPS — WAF rate-limiting prevented valid stress test
  • During-flood: 5/5 passed
  • Post-flood: 5/5 passed

fail_conditions.description: WAF process died during or after flood
<7/10 legitimate requests passed during flood
Flood tool achieved <10% of target RPS — WAF rate-limiting prevented valid stress test
<9/10 legitimate requests passed after flood
Legitimate requests received circuit_breaker (503) — unacceptable per contract §3.1 for volumetric abuse
Flood tool (wrk2) failed to execute or returned unexpected output

tests.scoring_formula: PASS → +3 pts | FAIL/SKIP → 0 pts | INT-04 = min(8, sum(all))

tests.name: Slowloris Defense
tests.description: WAF phát hiện và timeout 500 slow connections (1 byte/s headers, không bao giờ hoàn thành) trong 30 giây, đồng thời vẫn chấp nhận kết nối mới hợp lệ.
tests.pass_criterion: ≥90% slow connections bị timeout/closed (<120s); Service Available = YES; legitimate traffic vẫn accepted.
tests.scoring_explanation:
✗ FAIL — no_connections_established
  → Score: +0 pts
  • Reason: slowhttptest could not establish any connections — WAF may be blocking at connection level
  • Connections: 0 closed, 0 pending, 0 error
  • Service Available: true

tests.name: WAF-Targeted Flood (Fail-Close + Fail-Open)
tests.description: Khi WAF bị overload ở 100,000+ RPS, CRITICAL routes phải fail-close (503) và MEDIUM/CATCH_ALL/STATIC routes phải fail-open (200 từ upstream).
tests.pass_criterion: CRITICAL: 4/4 routes fail-close (503) → +4 pts; MEDIUM+CATCH_ALL+STATIC: ≥8/10 routes fail-open (200) → +3 pts.
tests.scoring_explanation:
✗ FAIL — critical_fail_close
  → Score: +0 pts
  • Reason: CRITICAL routes not all fail-close (503)
  • CRITICAL: 0/4 correct (expected fail_close)
  • MEDIUM: 2/5 correct (expected fail_open)
  • CATCH_ALL: 3/3 correct (expected fail_open)
  • STATIC: 1/2 correct (expected fail_open)

fail_conditions.description: WAF process died during flood
CRITICAL routes not all fail-close (503)
MEDIUM/CATCH_ALL/STATIC routes not all fail-open (200)
Flood tool (wrk2) failed to execute

tests.scoring_formula: PASS → +7 pts | FAIL/SKIP → 0 pts | INT-04 = min(8, sum(all))

tests.name: Backend Down / Circuit Breaker
tests.description: Khi UPSTREAM bị DOWN, WAF phát hiện và circuit-break (trả 503 circuit_breaker), không treo.
tests.pass_criterion: Tất cả verification requests qua WAF trả về 503 với X-WAF-Action: circuit_breaker.
tests.scoring_explanation:
✗ FAIL — no_circuit_breaker
  → Score: +0 pts
  • Reason: WAF không trả circuit_breaker — có thể treo, timeout, hoặc trả action khác

routes.fail_reason: expected HTTP 503, got 200; expected action 'circuit_breaker', got ''
expected HTTP 503, got 200; expected action 'circuit_breaker', got 'allow'
expected HTTP 503, got 401; expected action 'circuit_breaker', got 'allow'

fail_conditions.description: WAF không trả circuit_breaker — có thể treo, timeout, hoặc trả action khác

tests.scoring_formula: PASS → +2 pts | FAIL/SKIP → 0 pts | INT-04 = min(8, sum(all))

tests.name: Backend Slow / Timeout
tests.description: Khi UPSTREAM chậm (delay 10s), WAF timeout và trả 504 thay vì treo.
tests.pass_criterion: Tất cả verification requests qua WAF trả về 504 Gateway Timeout.
tests.scoring_explanation:
✗ FAIL — no_timeout
  → Score: +0 pts
  • Reason: WAF không timeout — treo hoặc trả status khác

fail_conditions.description: WAF không timeout — treo hoặc trả status khác
WAF trả status khác 504
Không thể set UPSTREAM về chế độ SLOW

tests.scoring_formula: PASS → +1 pts | FAIL/SKIP → 0 pts | INT-04 = min(8, sum(all))

tests.name: Recovery
tests.description: Sau khi UPSTREAM được khôi phục (từ DOWN và SLOW), WAF tiếp tục proxy bình thường.
tests.pass_criterion: Tất cả legitimate requests trả về 200 OK.
tests.scoring_explanation:
✓ PASS — Tất cả legitimate requests trả về 200 OK.
  → Score: +1/1 pts
  • 5/5 routes recovered to 200 OK

fail_conditions.description: WAF không phục hồi sau khi UPSTREAM restored
WAF vẫn circuit-break sau khi UPSTREAM healthy
WAF vẫn timeout sau khi UPSTREAM fast

tests.scoring_formula: PASS → +1 pts | FAIL/SKIP → 0 pts | INT-04 = min(8, sum(all))

tests.name: Fail-Mode Configurable
tests.description: Chứng minh fail-mode có thể cấu hình được — đổi MEDIUM tier fail_mode: close trong WAF config và hot-reload, MEDIUM routes chuyển từ fail-open sang fail-close dưới tải.
tests.pass_criterion: Sau khi config MEDIUM tier fail_mode=close, ≥4/5 MEDIUM routes fail-close (503) dưới tải.
tests.scoring_explanation:
✗ FAIL — medium_not_fail_close
  → Score: +0 pts
  • Reason: MEDIUM routes vẫn fail-open sau khi đổi config

tests.name: Fail-Mode Restore
tests.description: Revert fail-mode về open cho MEDIUM, hot-reload, và verify MEDIUM routes trở lại fail-open dưới tải.
tests.pass_criterion: Sau khi revert MEDIUM tier fail_mode=open, ≥4/5 MEDIUM routes fail-open (200) dưới tải.

fail_conditions.description: MEDIUM routes vẫn fail-close sau khi revert
Prerequisite D08 not met — cannot test restore
Config revert không có hiệu lực sau hot-reload

tests.scoring_formula: PASS → +1 pts | FAIL/SKIP → 0 pts | INT-04 = min(8, sum(all))

scoring_methodology:
INT-04 — Resilience & Degradation (cap 8 pts, raw max 20 pts)

Scoring Methodology (per phase_D.md v2.3 §6):

  raw_score = sum(D01..D09 sub-scores)
  INT-04   = min(8, raw_score)

  Where each sub-score = 0 if test FAIL/SKIP, else max_score

  D01 — HTTP Flood Survival     : 3 pts
  D02 — Slowloris Handling      : 2 pts
  D03 — RUDY Handling           : 2 pts
  D04 — Fail-Close (CRITICAL)   : 4 pts
  D04 — Fail-Open (MEDIUM)      : 3 pts
  D05 — Circuit Breaker         : 2 pts
  D06 — Backend Timeout         : 1 pt
  D07 — Recovery                : 1 pt
  D08+D09 — Fail-Mode Config    : 2 pts

  WAF cần đạt ≥ 8/20 điểm thô để max INT-04.
  Các tổ hợp đạt max: pass D01(3)+D04(4)+D05(2)=9, or D04(7)+D07(1)=8, etc.
